query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS event_orders (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  eventNumber VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  inquiryId INT,
  customerName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  customerEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  customerPhone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  companyName VARCHAR(200),
  eventType ENUM('wedding', 'corporate', 'school', 'private', 'other') NOT NULL,
  eventDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  eventTime VARCHAR(50),
  venue TEXT NOT NULL,
  guestCount INT NOT NULL,
  subtotal INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  discountAmount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  discountReason TEXT,
  sgst INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  cgst INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalAmount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  advancePercentage INT DEFAULT 50 NOT NULL,
  advanceAmount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  advancePaid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  advancePaidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  balanceAmount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  balancePaid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  balancePaidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'quoted', 'confirmed', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  internalNotes TEXT,
  customerNotes TEXT,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdByName VARCHAR(200),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  status ENUM('draft', 'quoted', 'confirmed', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  internalNotes TEXT,
  customerNotes TEXT,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdByName VARCHAR(200),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
